selections.name: Randie's Rascal (GB)
selections.reason: Boasts massive 104 speed and 115 class ratings. Has shown excellent early speed in both starts and fits perfectly in this turf sprint.

selections.name: Ez Pal
selections.reason: First-time starter for the deadly Wesley Ward barn with Irad Ortiz Jr. aboard. Must be respected on debut.

selections.name: August
selections.reason: Mark Casse first-time starter getting Jose Ortiz in the irons. Pedigree suggests turf sprint ability.

selections.name: Smoke Trail
selections.reason: Flashed a 95 speed figure on debut. With natural progression second time out, can hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Generational
danger_horse.reason: Asmussen first-time starter with strong works leading up to debut.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #7, Exacta Box 4-7, Trifecta 4,7 / 4,7,8 / ALL

selections.name: Global Sensation
selections.reason: Strong 106 speed and 100 class ratings. Won last out by 3 lengths at Churchill Downs and maintains excellent form.

selections.name: Fifty Cent Dollars
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 101 speed figure. The outside post is fine in this 6.5F chute and should get a clean trip.

selections.name: Derby Date
selections.reason: Presents a 103 speed figure. Very consistent type who is always in the mix at this claiming level.

selections.name: Furious Anger
selections.reason: Capable of a 106 speed figure on his best day. Needs pace to run at but can close for a share.

danger_horse.name: Catamount
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw with a 102 speed figure; dangerous if he secures the rail advantage early.

selections.name: Gewurztraminer
selections.reason: Dominant 113 speed and 107 class ratings. Irad Ortiz takes the mount on a horse that looks significantly faster than this field.

selections.name: Fountain Run
selections.reason: Solid 107 speed figure and 102 class. Has the tactical speed to sit a perfect trip just off the pace.

selections.name: My Noble Knight
selections.reason: Brings a 105 speed rating and 103 class. Jose Ortiz rides, and the horse has proven stamina for the route.

selections.name: Military Road
selections.reason: Gaffalione aboard for David Jacobson. Consistent 101 speed figure makes him a logical exotic piece.

danger_horse.name: Underdressed
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a 109 speed figure at his peak; dangerous if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Hellacious
selections.reason: Taking a significant class drop from MSW to MCL $30k. 103 speed and 101 class ratings make him the one to beat here.

selections.name: Susan's Boy
selections.reason: Morning line favorite at 6/5. Consistent MSW dropper who should relish the easier company today.

selections.name: Kuch
selections.reason: First start since being reported as a gelding. Gaffalione rides; equipment change could unlock his 107 raw speed potential.

selections.name: Hamlet
selections.reason: Speed figure of 106 is capped by class disparity rules, but still competitive enough to hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Lasting Quality
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and gets a weight break; could sneak into the exotics with a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Step Forward
selections.reason: Raw speed of 123 is capped, but still normalizes to a field-best 116. Classy turf sprinter who is the deserving 3/2 favorite.

selections.name: Otto The Conqueror
selections.reason: Perfectly matched 110 speed and 110 class ratings. Should get a great stalking trip from the inside post.

selections.name: Exploration
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz takes the mount. 105 speed and 105 class ratings make him a very consistent threat in this spot.

selections.name: Normandy Coast
selections.reason: Solid 106 class rating. Can sit just off the early speed duel and pick up the pieces late.

danger_horse.name: Mister Mmmmm
danger_horse.reason: Has a massive 116 speed figure on his best day; dangerous if he gets loose on the lead.

selections.name: Both Sides Of Bad
selections.reason: Speed rating of 105 is the best in the field. Taking a class drop and should appreciate the long Churchill stretch.

selections.name: Bourbon Rage
selections.reason: Massive class drop (105 class rating). If he can replicate his back class, he will be tough to hold off.

selections.name: Whatever
selections.reason: Consistent 97 speed and 98 class. Should be forwardly placed and has a chance to wire the field if left alone.

selections.name: Big Rog
selections.reason: Speed figure of 99 makes him competitive for the underneath spots in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Paired
danger_horse.reason: Gets a weight break with the bug boy; could outrun his odds if he saves ground.

selections.name: Sharons Beach
selections.reason: Excellent 107 speed and 109 class ratings. Drawn well inside for the 7-furlong chute and gets Luis Saez.

selections.name: Social Hour
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz rides this 109 class horse. Should get a perfect stalking trip tracking the early leaders.

selections.name: Palacios
selections.reason: Morning line favorite at 5/2. Classy 104 rating and consistently runs well at this starter allowance level.

selections.name: Big Gain
selections.reason: Speed rating of 106 shows he has the raw talent to compete here; outside post is fine in the 7F chute.

danger_horse.name: Baytown Bruiser
danger_horse.reason: Speed of 106 and class of 105. The rail draw is tricky, but he has the numbers to upset if he breaks cleanly.

selections.name: Supercharger
selections.reason: Standout 112 class rating and 106 speed. Jose Ortiz rides the 8/5 favorite who looks primed to fire.

selections.name: Rothschild
selections.reason: Huge 115 speed figure. If he can transfer his best form to this 9-furlong distance, he is the main danger.

selections.name: Telescopic
selections.reason: Boasts a massive 117 raw speed figure. Inside draw saves ground on both turns; Gaffalione is a plus.

selections.name: My Boy Tony
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz takes the mount on this 113 speed horse. Will be closing late and should appreciate the long stretch.

danger_horse.name: Blast Furnace
danger_horse.reason: 113 speed and 108 class. Outside draw is tough, but he has the talent to overcome it.
